codeReview.summary: The fix is narrow and matches the Lane 01 contract. `ApiResponse.timestamp` and `TenantRuntimeMetricsDto.policyUpdatedAt` are explicitly serialized as strings, and the updated integration tests lock in both the tenant-admin denial on `PUT /api/v1/admin/settings` and the restored date-time parity on the surviving runtime and portal read surfaces. The worker handoff shows an intentional red-phase characterization failure before the annotations, followed by green targeted validation, green `gate-fast`, and compose-backed API probes that confirmed the runtime now matches `openapi.json`.

summary: PASS. Lane 01 now preserves the super-admin-only global-settings mutation boundary while the approved read surfaces emit the published date-time fields again.
